notes: fixture session: slab allocator fail — heap-analysis skill guided a tier-specific GDB Python walker that recovered heap state, but safe-linking blocks fake object placement

heap-analysis skill Phase 2 guided a tier-specific GDB Python walker for the thread-local cache and central arena. Phase 3 confirmed deterministic slot reuse after controlled free. Phase 4 found that the allocator uses safe-linking (XOR with per-slab random key), and the key is derived from a value the agent cannot observe without a separate info leak. Fake object pointer encoding fails validation, blocking vtable hijack.
